notes:
Multifunction device: printer/scanner/copier/fax. The integrated flatbed scanner has an automatic document feeder.

Prints also reasonably well with various "cdj...", "gimp-print"/"stp", or "pcl3"/"hpdj" drivers.

For basic printing functionality use the HPIJS driver . For advanced functionality such as printer status, maintenance features, scanning and photo card unload use the HPLIP driver (which includes HPIJS).

Copying works fine from the front panel.

Consumables/Refills: HP51645A $25-35, HP C1823D $35-40
